title: Marketplace Manager - Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Delhi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates:
Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India Asia Pacific Associates!
